## What problem does this solve?

Describe the gap or limitation you ran into with the current skill.

## Proposed solution

What would you like to see added or changed?

## Example

If relevant, show what the output / behaviour should look like (e.g. a sample map or mode trigger).

## Additional context

Any other details, references, or inspiration.
